host.description: A multi-agent AI orchestration system with opencode task() subagents + Gajae-Code Coordinator MCP, MCP server integrations, kanban pipeline, and autonomous cron-based operations.

entries.description: Data analysis agent. Queries kanban DB, git log, gbrain stats for patterns, trends, and insights. Produces structured reports. Read-only on production data.
representativeQueries: analyze kanban completion trends this week
what patterns do you see in git commit history
show me gbrain stats and anomalies

entries.description: Documentation and record-keeping agent. Writes changelogs, updates docs, saves kanban completion summaries. Does NOT implement features.
representativeQueries: write a changelog for today's changes
save kanban completion summary
update project documentation

entries.description: CMO-style content agent. Observes recent work activity (sessions, kanban, git), identifies narrative-worthy material, produces blog + X thread + LinkedIn drafts. Maintains narrative arc continuity.
representativeQueries: draft a blog post about what I worked on this week
create an X thread about the kanban pipeline refactor
write a LinkedIn post about our agent architecture

entries.description: UI/UX design agent. Creates mockups, SVG assets, components. Uses Lazyweb for references, baseline-ui for conventions. Does NOT implement backend logic.
representativeQueries: design a mockup for the settings page
create an SVG diagram of the agent pipeline
find UI references for a paywall screen

entries.description: Content editing and QA agent. Reviews drafts for tone, voice, clarity, and Korean language quality. Final quality gate before publishing.
representativeQueries: review this blog post for tone and clarity
check this Korean translation for natural phrasing
final QA pass before publishing

entries.description: Read-only research and exploration agent. Gathers context, traces call chains, reports patterns. Cannot modify files. ESCALATE capability for hard problems.
representativeQueries: explore how the authentication module works
trace the call chain for user login
research the database schema and relationships

entries.description: Implementation agent. Writes code, creates files, applies patches. Follows project conventions. Verifies with lint/test after changes.
representativeQueries: implement the login API endpoint
refactor the database layer to use D1
write unit tests for the payment module

entries.description: Work orchestration and pipeline management. Assigns tasks across agent profiles, tracks progress, resolves blockers. Delegates — does NOT implement.
representativeQueries: orchestrate the deployment pipeline across all agents
assign tasks for the new feature implementation
check progress and resolve blockers

entries.description: Task decomposition and planning agent. Breaks complex goals into atomic, actionable tasks with dependency ordering. Produces structured plans only.
representativeQueries: break down the migration into actionable tasks
create a plan for implementing the new dashboard
what are the dependencies for the Q3 roadmap

entries.description: Code review agent. Reviews changes for logic errors, edge cases, style, security, testing, and over-engineering. Does NOT modify files.
representativeQueries: review the latest pull request for logic errors
check this implementation for edge cases
review code style and potential over-engineering

entries.description: Critical code review for architecturally significant changes. Architecture integrity, abstraction boundaries, performance, migration strategy. Second set of eyes after standard reviewer.
representativeQueries: critically review the architecture of this refactoring
audit abstraction boundaries in the new module
review the migration strategy for potential regressions

entries.description: Security-focused code review. Audits for injection, crypto misuse, auth bypass, privilege escalation, secret leakage. Blocks release on CRITICAL findings.
representativeQueries: audit this code for security vulnerabilities
check for crypto misuse in the encryption module
review auth flow for privilege escalation risks

entries.description: SEO service dedicated development agent. Builds the ~/seo-service/ project exclusively.
representativeQueries: build the SEO analysis endpoint
deploy the SEO service worker
integrate payment for the SEO product

entries.description: Site Reliability Engineering agent. Manages launchd services, cron jobs, deployment pipelines, and incident response. Read-only first.
representativeQueries: check the status of all launchd services
investigate why the cron job failed
restart the discord bot service

entries.description: Test agent. Writes and runs tests for implemented code. Verifies correctness before review. Max 2 fix cycles before reporting unrecoverable failure.
representativeQueries: write tests for the new payment endpoint
run the test suite and report failures
verify the refactoring doesn't break existing tests
